summary: Phase 3 Batches 3A/3B/3C end-to-end testing. Backend: 40/40 pytest PASS (12 game-score + 21 mittari + 7 phase3 pipeline) plus 6/6 new review-specific tests (auth 401 checks, dial.state.value int, cockpit shape, operator_update→site+telegram+email fanout, distribution_results on /admin/queue/{id}) = 46/46 green. Frontend: weezybet (PARTNER) shows operator-live-strip-partner (LIVE DATA · LAST 5 MIN) + operator-primary-cta + operator-bottom-cta + sticky-mobile-cta and ZERO no-strip/non-partner-notice — gate correct. Non-partners norgekasino + paf both show operator-no-live-strip + operator-non-partner-notice with ZERO operator-primary-cta / operator-bottom-cta / sticky-mobile-cta. Norgekasino FI copy verified: 'EI REAALIAIKAISTA SEURANTAA' / 'Mittari ei seuraa tämän operaattorin reaaliaikaista dataa' + 'VAIN TOIMITUKSELLINEN ARVIO' eyebrow; EN variant 'NO LIVE TRACKING / Mittari does not track this operator's real-time data' also rendered. Back-office /back-office/queue auth screen renders with token input + CONTINUE button + BACK TO MITTARI link. Home DialCockpit Pääsyy/PRIMARY DRIVER chip + Viimeisin piikki/LAST SPIKE block — CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG FOUND & FIXED: Home.jsx imported only `useState` but CockpitContext component used `useEffect`, causing 'useEffect is not defined' PAGE ERROR that crashed the entire React tree on home (white screen, no hero, no dial, no cockpit). After 1-line import fix (added useEffect), home now renders fully: hero-capture present, cockpit-context present, cockpit-paasyy='PRIMARY DRIVER · STREAMERS LIVE', cockpit-viimeisin-piikki='LAST SPIKE · Testipromo kiertää jakelukanavissa…', 0 console errors, 0 page errors.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED by tester — 'useEffect is not defined' page error crashed entire home (white screen). useEffect was not imported in Home.jsx line 1. One-line fix applied. Verify on retest.

issues: Spec calls for 'LATEST SPIKE' eyebrow but code renders 'LAST SPIKE' (Home.jsx line 142). Minor copy mismatch — confirm intended wording with PM.

action_items: [CRITICAL — already fixed by tester, please verify retest] Home.jsx missing useEffect import caused white-screen crash on home. Fix applied: line 1 now reads `import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';`. Please confirm this doesn't conflict with main agent's pending changes.
[LOW] Copy mismatch — Home.jsx line 142 uses 'LAST SPIKE' but review brief says 'LATEST SPIKE'. Decide canonical wording.
[CARRYOVER LOW] index.html title 'Emergent | Fullstack App' still not Mittari-branded.
[CARRYOVER LOW] data-testid='leaderboard-table' wrapper still missing on /peli.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx line 1: useEffect missing from React import was a P0 regression — entire home page tree crashed silently (PAGE_ERROR, no console.error). Recommend an ErrorBoundary around CockpitContext (and similar cockpit/dial children) so a single component crash doesn't blank the home page.

signal_engine + dial_engine + distribution modules all behave per spec under mocked-API mode (twitch/youtube/forum/sports/telegram/email all gracefully fall back with mocked:true; kick hits real public API).
Distribution fanout cleanly attaches results to both approve response.published.distribution_results AND persists onto queue item retrievable via GET /api/admin/queue/{id} — good.
401 gating is consistent across all admin/* endpoints without X-Admin-Token.
OperatorReview gating logic by `operator.slug === 'weezybet'` works exactly as described — clean partner-vs-non-partner surface separation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after Home.jsx import fix; 0/6 before fix (home crashed)

seed_data_creation: Multiple signal poll cycles + 3 queue items generated+approved during distribution fanout tests (moment_commentary x2 + operator_update x1). Distribution log + signal/dial_snapshot collections populated with test data; not cleaned up since they're append-only history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 (3A signals + 3B dial recalc + 3C distribution) fully landed and passing. OperatorReview surface cleanup is the only frontend change and is correct (weezybet partner / non-partners gated cleanly). One critical-but-trivial bug (missing useEffect import in Home.jsx) was found and fixed by tester — verify it persists. Spec wording 'LATEST SPIKE' vs code's 'LAST SPIKE' is the only outstanding minor mismatch. All admin endpoints require X-Admin-Token: mittari-admin. Mocked channels (twitch/yt/forum/sports/telegram/email) are by design — kick is the only live external poll.
rca_of_the_issue: Home white-screen RCA: Home.jsx imported only `useState` from React but the newly added CockpitContext component (lines 102-148) calls `useEffect(...)` to poll /api/cockpit every 30s. Calling an undefined function inside a function component throws 'useEffect is not defined' on first render, which propagates up through React's reconciler and unmounts the entire tree under <Home/>. No ErrorBoundary was present so the page rendered as blank body. Reproduction: visit `/` → page is blank white + page-error console listener catches 'useEffect is not defined'. Fix: add useEffect to the React import on Home.jsx line 1. Mitigation: long-term, wrap CockpitContext in an ErrorBoundary so any future runtime error in optional cockpit subcomponents doesn't take down the whole home page.
